subject: [PATCH v10 11/15] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch adds a new category to the pagemap, called PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, which is used for read-write protection (RWP) tracking in userfaultfd. It introduces a new bit in the PTE that indicates whether a page has been accessed, and scopes it to the VMA whose registered mode makes the bit meaningful. This change allows RWP to have its own pagemap category, distinct from write protection, and enables future implementations to move RWP to a separate PTE bit without affecting existing code. The patch also updates documentation and code to reflect these changes.
